text: Sam Neill, actor known for ‘Jurassic Park,’ dies at 78 - NBC News
fullText: Sam Neill, the genre-spanning New Zealand actor best known for his starring role in the “Jurassic Park” movies, has died, his family said Monday.

text: Oil prices jump and world shares are mixed as US and Iran carry out airstrikes - AP News
fullText: Oil prices have jumped and world shares are mixed after the U.S. carried out airstrikes and Iran retaliated. The prices of Brent crude and U.S. benchmark crude gained more than 2% early Monday. South Korea's Kospi sank 9%. On Friday, U.S. stocks rose as Wall …

text: 'Once it's gone, it's gone': How to future-proof your hearing - BBC
fullText: It's not just rocket launches and death metal concerts that lead to hearing loss. Many everyday activities can cause damage. Here's what you can do to protect your ears.

text: US and Iran vie for Strait of Hormuz, waterway key to global energy supplies, in latest attacks - AP News
fullText: The United States and Iran each are asserting they control the Strait of Hormuz after a weekend of attacks stretching across the wider Middle East. The attacks that continued into Monday morning further threatened any diplomacy to end the war. The attacks und…

text: SK Hynix Shares Drop in Seoul After Much-Hyped US Trading Debut - Bloomberg.com
fullText: South Korea’s AI-fueled stock rally came under renewed pressure Monday as SK Hynix Inc. tumbled by a record 15%, underscoring growing investor concerns that the boom has become overstretched.

text: Jay-Z Addresses Three-Hour Delay at Yankee Stadium Concert, Says He Wanted to Avoid Fans Getting “Trampled” - The Hollywood Reporter
fullText: "I'm really sorry for the inconvenience, but I had to make sure everyone was OK," the rapper said after  his show started more than three hours after its original expected start time.

text: Europe's Anduril rival Helsing raises $1.8 billion at $18 billion valuation - CNBC
fullText: Helsing said "investor demand significantly exceeded the available allocation" for its $1.8 billion funding round.

text: Fire breaks out at a pub in Bangkok, killing at least 27 people - AP News
fullText: A huge fire that engulfed a beer hall in Bangkok overnight has killed at least 27 people and injured dozens more. Firefighters brought the blaze under control early Monday. Rescuers said the fire was reported around midnight Sunday. Footage shared online by f…

text: U.S. and Iran exchange strikes as Strait of Hormuz standoff escalates - CNBC
fullText: Iran responded to a fresh wave of strikes by U.S. forces by launching an attack on American military bases in several Gulf states.

text: Oil prices jump as US and Iran trade attacks over Strait of Hormuz - Al Jazeera
fullText: Brent crude climbs more than 4 percent as Washington and Tehran clash over control of critical waterway.

text: McConnell says a fall led to his hospitalization, breaking weeks of silence - NPR
fullText: Sen. Mitch McConnell on Sunday revealed that a fall led to his hospitalization, breaking the silence about his condition after weeks of mounting speculation about the Kentucky Republican's health.

text: Fever beat Aces again as Caitlin Clark scores 12 in 24 minutes - ESPN
fullText: The Fever beat the defending champion Aces in Las Vegas for the second time in eight days. Caitlin Clark, who has been dealing with back issues, played 24 minutes and finished with 12 points, seven rebounds and six assists.

text: Ukraine reels after Sen. Lindsey Graham’s sudden death, fearing a weaker link to Trump - AP News
fullText: Republican Sen. Lindsey Graham's death has left Ukraine without a key ally in President Donald Trump’s circle. Ukrainian lawmakers expressed concern over the loss of Graham, who was instrumental in advocating for Ukraine in Washington. Graham had recently vis…

text: Pixel 11 Pro Fold leak shows off Google's classy Pine color and a sleeker camera design - Android Authority
fullText: The Pixel 11 Pro Fold has leaked again, this time in Google's new "Pine" colorway, matching previously outed renders.

text: What to know: Two cases of cyclosporiasis confirmed in NH, DHHS says - WMUR
fullText: The Centers for Disease Control and Prevention is tracking cases of cyclosporiasis, a parasitic infection, in 31 states — including New Hampshire. Here's what you need to know.

text: U.S. citizen working for humanitarian organization tests positive for Ebola in DR Congo - NBC News
fullText: The outbreak has caused at least 1,830 confirmed cases in Congo, including 648 deaths, health officials said. Cases have also been confirmed in neighboring Uganda.

text: ‘Love Island USA’ Season 8 Crowns Its Winners - Variety
fullText: On Sunday, Bryce and Trinity were chosen as the winners of "Love Island USA" Season 8 during the final episode, which aired on Peacock.

text: Fontainebleau forest near Paris hit by 'virulent' wildfire - France 24
fullText: A fast-moving wildfire south of Paris that scorched about 800 hectares of the Fontainebleau forest, could have been "intentional" Interior Minister Laurent Nunez said Monday on the scene. The fire prompted France to deploy two firefighting Canadair planes fro…

text: Want to own a real T. rex? It could cost you $30 million - NPR
fullText: The Tyrannosaurus rex fossil known as "Gus" will go up for auction on Tuesday. It's not the first time dinosaur bones have been sold to the highest bidder.

text: How Indian scientists are mapping the brain's last frontier - BBC
fullText: India's new brainstem atlas offers scientists an unprecedented map of one of the brain's least known regions.
